        private void setupActions(java.util.Set<java.lang.String> firstAutomataEdgeLabelsList,

      • processAction

        private void processAction(java.lang.String edgeLabel,
                           java.util.Set<java.lang.String> listEdgeLabels)
        Function produces two lists of unsynced and synced actions so we can later merge diagram elements together
        Parameters:
        edgeLabel - The edge to test whether it is in the other automatas edgelist (I.e what we can combine)
        listEdgeLabels - The edge list with which we are searching for things that match edgeLabel, so we can sync them.

      • processUnsyncedActions

                             throws CompilationException
        Throws:
        CompilationException
